title: OcexShipment
description: An OCEX advance ship notice document, equivalent to EDI 856. Notifies a buyer that goods have been shipped and provides carrier and tracking details.

type.description: Discriminator field identifying this as a shipment document.

sender.description: The party sending this shipment notice (typically the vendor/shipper).

receiver.description: The party receiving this shipment notice (typically the buyer).

documentDate.description: ISO 8601 date on which this shipment notice was created (YYYY-MM-DD).

shipmentId.description: Vendor-assigned shipment identifier, unique within the sender's system.

orderRef.description: Reference to the originating purchase order number.

carrier.description: Name or SCAC code of the carrier handling this shipment (e.g. "UPS", "FEDEX").

shipDate.description: ISO 8601 date on which goods were physically shipped (YYYY-MM-DD).

shipFrom.description: Address from which the goods are being shipped.

shipTo.description: Destination address for the shipped goods.

lineItems.description: One or more shipped line items.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata for extension or passthrough data.

id.description: Party identifier (e.g. DUNS, GLN, or internal ID).

qualifier.description: EDI qualifier indicating the ID type (e.g. "01" for DUNS).

street2.description: Optional secondary address line (suite, floor, etc.).

lineNumber.description: Sequential line number within the document.

quantity.description: Quantity of the item shipped on this line.

unitOfMeasure.description: Unit of measure code (e.g. "EA" for each, "CS" for case).

totalPrice.description: Total price for this line (quantity * unitPrice).

buyerPartNumber.description: Buyer's internal part number for this item.

vendorPartNumber.description: Vendor's internal part number for this item.
